revenue: $1.77 billion, up 11.7% YoY compared to $1.59 billion

key_metrics: Gross profit increased to $1.05 billion from $951.6 million YoY

qoq_changes: Sequential quarter-over-quarter (Q2 2025 to Q3 2025) financial data was not provided in the excerpt, but 39-week YTD revenue grew 14.4% to $5.12 billion.
new_risks: Specific new risks are not detailed in the provided excerpt as Item 1A (Risk Factors) was omitted from the text.
management_tone: Cautiously optimistic; top-line revenue and gross profit showed strong double-digit growth, though net income growth was constrained by rising operating expenses and higher income tax provisions.
analyst_note: Garmin delivered solid top-line growth of 11.7% in Q3 2025, but bottom-line expansion was muted by a 14.7% increase in total operating expenses (driven by R&D and SG&A) and higher taxes, resulting in essentially flat net income YoY.
